title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
abstract: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary...
abstract_zh: 伙计们，我最近发现了个神器——**codebase-memory-mcp**！写周报时还在拼命搜代码细节？调Bug时脑袋里像装了九万个文件？这工具就是你的救星！它能迅速整理你的项目历史，帮你一秒定位关键信息。比那些笨拙的搜索工具强多了，简直就是代码记忆大师！赶紧试试吧！
